protocol.name: PFCR-1 — Post-Funding Cross-Sectional Crowding Release
protocol.claim: After an observed common funding settlement, the highest-funding alt underperforms the lowest-funding alt over four hours when the current cross-sectional funding spread is extreme relative to prior settlements.

novelty_boundary.versus_afch: post-settlement four-hour price release, not 28-day pre-settlement carry harvest
novelty_boundary.versus_lore_lorc_cres: funding-settlement event and current funding-rank pair, not residual/flow extremes
novelty_boundary.versus_btc_funding_settlement_families: factor-beta-neutral cross-alt pair with no BTC directional position
novelty_boundary.versus_current_portfolio: no BTC, REX, OI, premium, Kimchi/FX, tree, Markov, or LLM direction

universe.position: one long alt and one short alt; no BTC leg

source_contract.funding: exact reported rate and millisecond settlement timestamp per symbol
source_contract.common_settlement: all six symbols have exactly one row at the same timestamp

feature_formula.current_spread: max current settled rate minus min current settled rate
feature_formula.eligible: current spread > strictly-prior rolling q90 and spread > 0
feature_formula.short_symbol: lexically tie-broken current maximum funding rate
feature_formula.long_symbol: lexically tie-broken current minimum funding rate
feature_formula.factor: median completed hourly return of the other five alts
feature_formula.weights: positive gross-one weights solving long_beta*w_long = short_beta*w_short

clock.same_timestamp_funding: current settlement is not earned or paid because entry is later

execution.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM, entry/exit and hypothetical liquidation cost, funding cash, and held favorable-before-adverse two-leg OHLC
execution.cagr: full declared wall-clock including idle time

controls_not_repair_candidates: entry and exit delayed five minutes
ten basis points per notional side
protocol.stop_rule: Reject before outcomes if support fails. Reject before 2025 if the singleton fails 2023-2024. Reject before 2026 if it fails 2025. Never repair on a consumed future window.
